verdict.answer_first: A's first sentence is the direct advice: 'Start by making the error observable'
verdict.decisiveness: B is more decisive, boiling everything down to a clear, prioritized plan: 'My suggested first two moves: 1. Pull up the grouped stack trace(s) for the 500s. 2. Plot the 500 rate per host/instance over the last day.'
verdict.fabrication: B invents the context of being on the same machine: 'if your API code is on this machine, point me at it and I'll dig in directly.'
verdict.actionability: B is more actionable due to its scannable table and extremely clear, prioritized final two steps.
